title: JASDF Scrambles Fighters 19 Times Against Chinese Russian Aircraft Near Senkaku Islands
summary: Japan Air Self-Defense Force launches fighters multiple times to intercept Chinese and Russian aircraft approaching airspace. Incidents spike amid ongoing territorial tensions. Authorities monitor skies closely to defend sovereignty.
contents:
## JASDF Scrambles Fighters 19 Times Against Chinese Russian Aircraft Near Senkaku Islands

### Overview
Japan Air Self-Defense Force launches fighters multiple times to intercept Chinese and Russian aircraft approaching airspace. Incidents spike amid ongoing territorial tensions. Authorities monitor skies closely to defend sovereignty.

### Event Details
Japan Air Self-Defense Force scrambles fighters 19 times during fiscal year 2025 to counter Chinese and Russian aircraft approaching national airspace, Defense Minister Gen Nakatani reveals. Chinese jets trigger most interceptions, with Russian planes contributing significantly near Senkaku Islands. Pilots fly alongside intruders, visually confirm identities, and escort them away from restricted zones. Tensions escalate as China deploys advanced J-20 stealth fighters repeatedly, prompting JASDF F-15s and F-35s to respond swiftly from Naha and other bases. Russia joins exercises, sending Su-30s and Il-38s into East China Sea corridors. JASDF logs exceed 400 scrambles annually, with recent uptick showing 70 against China alone in early 2026. Forces conduct rigorous training drills simulating intercepts over Senkakus, enhancing readiness. Officials express concerns over aggressive maneuvers risking mid-air collisions. Prime Minister Fumio Kishida directs bolstered surveillance using E-2D Hawkeyes and ground radars. Allies like U.S. Forces Japan coordinate joint patrols, deterring incursions. Public remains vigilant as media highlights footage of close encounters. Government allocates funds for additional F-35 squadrons to maintain air superiority. Incidents underscore persistent disputes, with Japan protesting violations diplomatically. Military leaders pledge unwavering defense commitment.

### Source Context
@JASDF_PAO_ENG (Japan Air Self-Defense Force) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on japan air self-defense force jasdf scramble intercept chinese russian aircraft senkaku exercise news.
